title: UPC
description: Adds a block to convert between Tech Reborn and Modern Industrialization energy
body:
# UPC

Adds a block to convert between Tech Reborn and Modern Industrialization energy

### Usage

![usage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/upc/master/images/usage.png)

Converts between TR energy and MI energy both ways with 1:1 ratio

### Recipe

![recipe](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/upc/master/images/recipe.png)

Substitute iron ingot with any c:iron_ingots and copper ingot with any c:copper_ingots
